title: lobivia huascha var. calliantha
intro: Lobivia huascha var. calliantha, also known as the Calliantha variety of the Huascha cactus, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Cactaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lobivia huascha var. calliantha include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and provide relief from congestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using its root and stem in a tincture, although its use and preparation should be done under the guidance of a medical professional.
